select_when: Trust depends on whether words, incentives, and behavior line up under pressure rather than on whether the presentation sounds polished.
The relationship itself will change whether the plan is actually carried out, especially in coaching, advisory, leadership, or negotiation settings.
The real problem is defensive signaling, status maintenance, or fear-driven withholding rather than lack of technical analysis alone.
The work needs grounded candor that puts real-time internal experience into words without substituting style for substance.
avoid_when: Authenticity is being used as a shield against evidence, preparation, or accountability for consequences.
The communication problem is being treated as if style alone can compensate for weak domain knowledge or missing factual grounding.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model centered on congruence, grounded candor, and anti-impression-management discipline rather than widening it into personality branding.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor self-expression sprawl beyond the raw source's stronger trust, transparency, and anti-style-without-substance material.
Did not add higher-order composition fields because this batch remains inside the frozen Wave 1 to Wave 3 contracts.
open_questions: The output type compresses a source that spans consulting leverage, leadership credibility, self-calibration, and AI persona realism.

select_when.note: The source is explicit that authenticity matters most when trust depends on congruence and when grounded candor changes whether expertise gets used.

avoid_when.note: The limitation and risk sections directly warn against style without substance and against using authenticity to evade discipline.

input_type.note: The source clearly activates on credibility and candor problems, while the compact type label is reviewed normalization.

output_type.note: The raw source yields grounded candor and trust-building leverage, but the typed output label is a compact reviewed abstraction.

reasoning_types.note: The model is naturally reflective about internal-external alignment and causal in how congruence changes trust and follow-through, while the taxonomy labels remain reviewed normalization.
